message:
test(e2e): add VCR mismatch debug instrumentation to TUI basic chat

Enhance e2e_tui_basic_chat_vcr with diagnostic tooling for VCR cassette
mismatch debugging:

- Set VCR_DEBUG_BODY=1 and VCR_DEBUG_BODY_FILE for body inspection
- Write expected request body JSON to temp file as artifact
  (expected_body.json)
- Set PI_STDERR_LOG and RUST_LOG=debug on the binary
- On failure: dump full pane content to debug-pane.txt artifact, print
  system prompt, expected body, and pane output to stderr
- Add clippy::too_many_lines allow attribute

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
